title: Koi Aap Sa
subTitle: Simran helps her best friend, Rohan, win over the girl he likes, Preeti. However, trouble ensues when Simran gets pregnant and Rohan is forced to marry her.

title: The Murderer
subTitle: Rocky, a well-known singer and performer at an elite hotel, becomes the prime suspect when Maheema, a news reporter, who was deeply in love with him, is found dead.

title: Gumnaam: The Mystery
subTitle: A stuntman falls in love with an aspiring actress. However, he must set out to find and rescue her after she mysteriously disappears.

title: Koi Aap Sa
subTitle: Simran helps her best friend, Rohan, win over the girl he likes, Preeti. However, trouble ensues when Simran gets pregnant and Rohan is forced to marry her.

title: Sun Zarra
subTitle: Trisha and Rohit's chance encounter sparks a love connection between them, until a tragic accident tests their love and commitment for each other.

title: Khuda Kasam
subTitle: CBI Officer Neetu Singh is framed for the assassination of a chief minister. She then attempts to solve this murder mystery with the help of a man, who is imprisoned for a crime he never committed.

title: Hogi Pyar Ki Jeet
subTitle: Two brothers attempt to fulfil their dying father's wish by marrying two daughters of an old enemy, intending to exact revenge.

title: Toonpur Ka Superrhero
subTitle: After being kidnapped into a cartoon world, Aditya Kumar, a famous actor, turns into a real hero as he fights against the Toonasaurs.

title: Kitne Door Kitne Paas
subTitle: Jatin and Karishma, who meet each other on a plane to India, are set to marry the partners chosen by their respective parents. However, they find themselves attracted to each other.

title: Ki & Ka
subTitle: Kia, an ambitious woman, marries Kabir, a man who prefers the role of a house husband. They enjoy their unconventional relationship until challenges such as ego clashes and jealousy set in.

title: Ragini MMS
subTitle: A young couple visit a farmhouse to relax and unwind. However, their plans for rejuvenation are thrown into disarray when horrific events unfold.

title: Hostel
subTitle: Karan, a freshman, goes to live in a hostel and becomes a victim of ragging. After facing severe humiliation, he musters the courage to fight his perpetrators and also sets out to punish them.

title: Second Hand Husband
subTitle: Rajbir's wish to marry Gurpreet is delayed by his former wife, to whom he has to pay alimony until she remarries. Soon, he and his current partner hatch a plan to find her a potential suitor.

title: Mangal Pandey - The Rising
subTitle: Mangal Pandey and William Gordon become friends during a war in Afghanistan. But when the East India Company introduces a rifle that uses objectionable cartridges, Mangal Pandey rises in revolt.

title: Krantiveer
subTitle: Pratap, a gambler disowned by his family, comes under the care of a landlord named Laxminath. When corrupt forces lead to Laxminath's murder, Pratap seeks revenge.

title: Maidan E Jung
subTitle: Arjun helps Uday escape from his wedding to a rich girl and marry his sister, Meenakshi. Unhappy at this turn of events, Uday's parents decide to seek revenge and kill Meenakshi.

title: Baghban
subTitle: Raj and Pooja live an upsetting life when their sons refuse to reciprocate their affections and take care of them.

title: Undertrial
subTitle: A factory worker faces a nightmare when he is wrongly framed for a heinous crime and comes across shocking revelations that are hidden in the dark.

title: Undertrial
subTitle: A factory worker faces a nightmare when he is wrongly framed for a heinous crime and comes across shocking revelations that are hidden in the dark.

title: Love Alive
subTitle: Bhaarat reminisces a dream about a happy and fulfilling life, only to wake up lonely the next day. However, he finds love and strives to take his relationship forward.

title: Unakkaga Ellam Unakkaga
subTitle: Sakthivel, an irresponsible man, disapproves of the marriage arranged for him by his father and tries to ruin it. However, he is surprised to learn that the prospective bride is the woman he loves.

title: Karobaar: The Business of Love
subTitle: Friends Rajiv and Amar go their separate ways after Seema decides to be with Amar rather than Rajiv. Years later, prosecution lawyer Amar is delighted to see Rajiv in court and accused of murder.

subTitle: Raj and Pooja live an upsetting life when their sons refuse to reciprocate their affections and take care of them.

title: Freaky Ali
subTitle: Ali, an extortionist debt collector, decides to leave his murky past behind to pursue a new career in golf, a sport for which he has a natural talent.

title: Gulzar Dil
subTitle: Cheenu pretends to fall in love with Maya as part of a challenge. However, he eventually falls for her for real, and they must overcome family obstacles to be together.

title: Baazi
subTitle: An honest officer is framed for murder when he starts investigating a case. However, he manages to escape from prison and goes undercover as a woman to unravel the conspiracy.

title: Ragini MMS 2
subTitle: A director's decision to film an erotic horror movie in a haunted house brings trouble when a spirit possesses the body of the lead actress.

title: Movie
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.
